mapper.select: SELECT P.PLR_ID, P.PLR_NM, P.PLR_ENG_NM, P.PLR_HGT, P.PLR_WGT, P.PLR_DRFT_RND, P.PLR_DRFT_NO, P.PLR_BAT_PTCH_HAND_CD, P.PLR_ANSL_SAL, P.PLR_NTNLT, P.PLR_FRGN_YN, P.PLR_STTS_CD, P.PLR_OVRL_ABLT, P.PLR_POT_ABLT, T.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, T.TM_SHRT_KR_NM, PC.REPR_POSN_CD, RC.CD_NM AS REPR_POSN_NM FROM PLR P LEFT JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = P.TM_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PLR_ID, REPR_POSN_CD FROM PLR_TM_CNTRCT WHERE FA_CNTRCT_END_DT >= CURDATE() OR FA_CNTRCT_END_DT IS NULL GROUP BY PLR_ID ) PC ON PC.PLR_ID = P.PLR_ID LEFT JOIN CMN_CD RC ON RC.CD_ID = 'REPR_POSN' AND RC.CD_VAL = PC.REPR_POSN_CD WHERE P.PLR_ID = #{plrId}

SELECT A.PLR_ID, A.ABLT_CD, C.CD_NM AS ABLT_NM, C.CD_ENG_NM AS ABLT_ENG_NM, A.ABLT_VAL FROM PLR_ABLT A LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'ABLT' AND C.CD_VAL = A.ABLT_CD WHERE A.PLR_ID = #{plrId} ORDER BY A.ABLT_CD
SELECT PP.PLR_ID, PP.POSN_CD, C.CD_NM AS POSN_NM, PP.POSN_PRFC_ABLT FROM PLR_POSN PP LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'POSN' AND C.CD_VAL = PP.POSN_CD WHERE PP.PLR_ID = #{plrId} ORDER BY PP.POSN_CD

SELECT PT.PLR_ID, PT.TRT_CD, C.CD_NM AS TRT_NM, C.CD_ENG_NM AS TRT_ENG_NM, C.CD_DESC AS TRT_DESC FROM PLR_TRT PT LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'PLR_TRT_TYPE' AND C.CD_VAL = PT.TRT_CD WHERE PT.PLR_ID = #{plrId}

SELECT C.PLR_ID, C.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, C.FA_CNTRCT_BGNG_DT, C.FA_CNTRCT_END_DT, C.FA_AMT, C.REPR_POSN_CD, C.CNTRCT_TYPE_CD, CD.CD_NM AS CNTRCT_TYPE_NM FROM PLR_TM_CNTRCT C LEFT JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = C.TM_ID LEFT JOIN CMN_CD CD ON CD.CD_ID = 'CNTRCT_TYPE' AND CD.CD_VAL = C.CNTRCT_TYPE_CD WHERE C.PLR_ID = #{plrId} AND (C.FA_CNTRCT_END_DT >= CURDATE() OR C.FA_CNTRCT_END_DT IS NULL) ORDER BY C.FA_CNTRCT_BGNG_DT DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT H.PLR_ID, H.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, H.HIST_SEQ, H.HIST_DT, H.FA_CNTRCT_BGNG_DT, H.FA_CNTRCT_END_DT, H.FA_AMT, H.REPR_POSN_CD, H.CNTRCT_TYPE_CD, CD.CD_NM AS CNTRCT_TYPE_NM FROM PLR_TM_CNTRCT_HIST H LEFT JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = H.TM_ID LEFT JOIN CMN_CD CD ON CD.CD_ID = 'CNTRCT_TYPE' AND CD.CD_VAL = H.CNTRCT_TYPE_CD WHERE H.PLR_ID = #{plrId} ORDER BY H.HIST_DT DESC
SELECT PLR_ID, SSNT_YR, ANSL_SAL FROM PLR_ANSL_SAL_HIST WHERE PLR_ID = #{plrId} ORDER BY SSNT_YR DESC

SELECT A.PLR_ID, A.SSNT_YR, A.ABLT_CD, C.CD_NM AS ABLT_NM, A.ABLT_VAL, CASE WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 76 THEN 'S+' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 71 THEN 'S' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 66 THEN 'S-' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 61 THEN 'A+' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 56 THEN 'A' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 51 THEN 'A-' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 46 THEN 'B+' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 41 THEN 'B' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 36 THEN 'B-' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 31 THEN 'C+' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 26 THEN 'C' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 23 THEN 'C-' ELSE 'D' END AS ABLT_GRADE FROM PLR_ABLT_SSNT A LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'ABLT' AND C.CD_VAL = A.ABLT_CD WHERE A.PLR_ID = #{plrId} ORDER BY A.SSNT_YR DESC, A.ABLT_CD

SELECT R.PLR_ID, R.SSNT_YR, T.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, T.TM_SHRT_ENG_NM, R.G, R.PA, R.AB, R.H, R.DOBL, R.TRPL, R.HR, R.RBI, R.R, R.BB, R.SO, R.SB, R.CS, R.HBP, R.BA, R.OBP, R.SLG, R.OPS FROM PLR_BATR_SSNT_REC R LEFT JOIN PLR_BATR_TM_SSNT_REC PT ON PT.PLR_ID = R.PLR_ID AND PT.SSNT_YR = R.SSNT_YR LEFT JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = PT.TM_ID WHERE R.PLR_ID = #{plrId} ORDER BY R.SSNT_YR DESC

SELECT R.PLR_ID, R.SSNT_YR, T.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, T.TM_SHRT_ENG_NM, R.G, R.GS, R.IP_OUT, R.H, R.HR, R.R, R.ER, R.BB, R.SO, R.W, R.L, R.SV, R.HLD, R.ERA, R.WHIP FROM PLR_PTCH_SSNT_REC R LEFT JOIN PLR_PTCH_TM_SSNT_REC PT ON PT.PLR_ID = R.PLR_ID AND PT.SSNT_YR = R.SSNT_YR LEFT JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = PT.TM_ID WHERE R.PLR_ID = #{plrId} ORDER BY R.SSNT_YR DESC

SELECT M.PLR_ID, M.SSNT_YR, M.MON, T.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, M.G, M.PA, M.AB, M.H, M.HR, M.RBI, M.BB, M.SO, M.SB, M.BA, M.OBP, M.SLG, M.OPS FROM PLR_BATR_MON_REC M LEFT JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = M.TM_ID WHERE M.PLR_ID = #{plrId} AND M.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} ORDER BY M.MON

SELECT M.PLR_ID, M.SSNT_YR, M.MON, T.TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, M.G, M.GS, M.IP_OUT, M.H, M.HR, M.R, M.ER, M.BB, M.SO, M.W, M.L, M.SV, M.HLD, M.ERA, M.WHIP FROM PLR_PTCH_MON_REC M LEFT JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = M.TM_ID WHERE M.PLR_ID = #{plrId} AND M.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} ORDER BY M.MON

SELECT A.PLR_ID, A.SSNT_YR, A.MON, A.ABLT_CD, C.CD_NM AS ABLT_NM, A.ABLT_VAL, CASE WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 76 THEN 'S+' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 71 THEN 'S' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 66 THEN 'S-' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 61 THEN 'A+' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 56 THEN 'A' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 51 THEN 'A-' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 46 THEN 'B+' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 41 THEN 'B' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 36 THEN 'B-' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 31 THEN 'C+' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 26 THEN 'C' WHEN A.ABLT_VAL >= 23 THEN 'C-' ELSE 'D' END AS ABLT_GRADE FROM PLR_ABLT_MON A LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'ABLT' AND C.CD_VAL = A.ABLT_CD WHERE A.PLR_ID = #{plrId} AND A.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} ORDER BY A.MON, A.ABLT_CD

SELECT H.PLR_ID, H.HIDE_ABLT_CD, C.CD_NM AS HIDE_ABLT_NM, H.HIDE_ABLT_VAL FROM PLR_HIDE_ABLT H LEFT JOIN CMN_CD C ON C.CD_ID = 'HIDE_ABLT' AND C.CD_VAL = H.HIDE_ABLT_CD WHERE H.PLR_ID = #{plrId} ORDER BY H.HIDE_ABLT_CD
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PLR_FATG_COND (PLR_ID, SSNT_YR, FATG, COND) VALUES (#{plrId}, #{ssntYr}, #{fatg}, #{cond}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE FATG = #{fatg}, COND = #{cond}, UPD_DT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT EVNT_ID, SSNT_YR, EVNT_DT, EVNT_TYPE_CD, EVNT_TTLT, EVNT_CNTS FROM SSNT_EVNT WHERE PLR_ID = #{plrId} AND EVNT_TYPE_CD IN ('INJ', 'RCV') ORDER BY EVNT_DT DESC
